releaseNotes:
### 💎 Budget UI Overhaul
- Modern glassmorphism aesthetics with deep gradients.
- Improved padding (doubled) for a much cleaner, breathable layout.
- Enlarged category icons and intuitive transaction layout.

### 🛠 Fixes & Improvements
- Corrected Android OS version mismatch (now shows 2.2.1 in system settings).
- Background update checking (checks whenever the app is reopened).
- Auto-cleaning of old APK files.
